<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Create a Recovery Code"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/admin/recovery/code"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint creates a recovery code which should be given to the user in order for them to recover (or activate) their account.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
